description: Validation (qiyyum) of a legal document written and signed by Hillel b. ʿEli. Also signed by Ḥalfon b. Yiṣḥaq and one other person. The witnesses of the original document (now missing) included [...] b. Netanʾel ha-Hazzan, Natan b. Zekharya, and Shemuʾel b. Yosef.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
